narrative:
Jhon Arias is Colombia's Right Winger, holding an overall rating of 7.22/10. This impressive score places him in the top 3% of right wingers at this tournament. His rating range, from 6.87–7.56, reflects consistent contributions across his 381 World Cup minutes played.

At this World Cup, Arias has exceeded expectations, scoring 0.236 goals per 90 minutes against an expected goals (xG) of 0.22. He also demonstrates significant creativity with 1.89 key passes per 90 minutes, alongside a strong defensive work rate of 3.543 tackles per 90 minutes. His World Cup form represents a substantial improvement over his club goal rate of 0.079 per 90 minutes.

Arias is clearly a vital, dynamic presence for his national team, thriving under World Cup pressure. Scouts and fans should closely monitor his continued attacking output and relentless defensive effort in Colombia's upcoming fixtures. His current performance indicates he is a player capable of influencing games on both ends of the pitch.
